raw_input.title: Python Developer (Remote)
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Remote contract Python Developer. Work directly influences training and performance of next-generation AI systems. Develop, test and maintain Python/Django backend applications, PostgreSQL schemas, and real-world inputs that shape how AI models learn and reason.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer. Prefers real software roles; contract AI training/RLHF-like gigs should be verified before top-tier ranking.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: stack looks good, but contract/AI-training wording should prevent automatic top-tier APPLY_NOW until verified.
